title: Contract upgrade ahead
body: We're deploying upgraded Turbine contracts soon. Open orders will be cancelled at deployment — funds are always safe, but you'll need to re-place orders afterwards.

title: The $1M cap is gone
body: There's no maximum swap size anymore. Turbine was built for large trades — now nothing stops you from making them.

title: Deeper liquidity through Fynd
body: Orders now settle through Fynd's routing engine with wider protocol coverage — including Fluid and Ekubo — so large fills find the best price across more venues.

title: Sharper swap UI
body: Expand the DEX cost breakdown to see exactly what you'd pay elsewhere, pick fill windows from 3 minutes to 30 days, and get pair-specific fee comparisons instead of a flat 15 bps.

title: Instant orders
body: The new ⚡ stop fills your order in the very next batch. No waiting, no babysitting.
